holdings.infoBox: ASHS is an equity ETF with a total of 494 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Harvest CSI 500 China A-Shares Small Cap ETF (ASHS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CSI Smallcap 500 index. The fund tracks a market-cap-selected and -weighted index of 500 Chinese small-cap companies listed on the Shanghai and Shenzhen stock exchanges. ASHS was launched on May 21, 2014 and is issued by Xtrackers.

data.title: Cannabis, China and cancer treatment: These are 2019's best performing ETFs
data.text: The top performing ETFs so far in 2019 hit on three major themes: China, cannabis and genomics. Bob Pisani breaks down the trend with CFRA's Todd Rosenbluth and Astoria Advisors' John Davi.
